message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title GameEnginePluginLifecycle

participant "Host Application" as HostApp
participant "Host Application Interop" as Interop
participant "Game Engine Plugin" as Plugin

== Initialization ==
activate HostApp
HostApp -> HostApp: Initialization
HostApp -> Interop: new
activate Interop
Interop -> Interop: Load GE Plugin(s)
Interop -> Plugin: load into memory
activate Plugin
Interop -> Plugin: GEP_Initialize
Plugin --> Interop: initialization_ok = 0
deactivate Plugin
deactivate Interop
deactivate HostApp

== Main Loop ==
rectangle "loop [Repeat Every Frame Period]" {
    activate Interop
    Interop -> Plugin: GEP_HandleSimulationReponseMessages
    activate Plugin
    Plugin --> Interop: handled_ok = 0
    deactivate Plugin
    
    note right of Interop: delays
    
    Interop -> Plugin: GEP_HandleSimulationControlMessages
    activate Plugin
    Plugin --> Interop: handled_ok = 0
    deactivate Plugin
    deactivate Interop
}

@enduml
```
